overall.description: A first-person walk through a coastal beach environment at sunset, starting from the water's edge, ascending stairs to a residential street, and ending with a walk along a long wooden pier. The footage is from a video game (GTA V) featuring the Del Perro Pier area with warm sunset lighting and detailed coastal architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach at sunset with rocky shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the water's edge on wet sand toward a rocky outcrop with stilted beach houses

entered.detail: calm ocean water reflecting the pink and orange sunset sky
wet sandy shore with shallow water ripples
long wooden pier extending into the ocean with lights along its length
multi-story wooden beach house elevated on stilts with balconies
large boulders scattered along the shoreline
tall palm trees silhouetted against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a tranquil beach at sunset, with the ocean on the left and rocky outcrops with stilted beach houses on the right. The wooden pier is visible in the distance against a vibrant pink and orange sky, while wet sand reflects the fading light.

events.description: leaving the open beach and entering a narrow stone stairway between buildings
moving from bright sunset exposure into shaded area under trees and walls

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs between high concrete walls from beach level up to street level

entered.detail: wide stone staircase ascending between retaining walls
tall concrete retaining walls with weathered texture
metal chain link fence running along the right side

segments.scene_description: Ascending a stone stairway that cuts between beachfront properties, transitioning from the open beach to a more enclosed space with concrete walls and overhead tree canopy. The lighting shifts from bright sunset to shaded as the camera climbs toward street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal residential street with palm trees

events.description: exiting the stairway onto a paved coastal street with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt road lined with palm trees and beach houses toward the pier entrance

entered.detail: wet asphalt street reflecting the sunset colors
coastal residential buildings with garages and balconies
ornamental street lamps glowing with warm light
utility poles and power lines crossing the street
blue sign reading 'DEL PERRO PIER' with white lettering

segments.scene_description: Walking along a quiet coastal street at dusk, with wet asphalt reflecting the pink sky, palm trees lining the road, and beach houses on the left. The camera approaches the entrance to Del Perro Pier, passing under street lights and power lines.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing pier extending over the ocean

events.description: stepping from the street onto the wooden planks of the pier entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier toward the ocean horizon, passing benches and light fixtures

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the pier walkway
white painted wooden railings along the pier edges
black metal benches facing the ocean
metal mesh trash receptacles
vintage style lamp posts along the pier
decorative tower structures at the end of the pier

segments.scene_description: Walking along the length of Del Perro Pier, with wooden planks underfoot and white railings on both sides. The pier extends over the calm ocean toward the sunset horizon, lined with benches and vintage light fixtures, while seagulls fly overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a tranquil shoreline through a residential coastal neighborhood and onto a long wooden pier under a vibrant sunset. It begins by walking along wet sand that reflects a pink and orange sky, with the ocean on one side and stilted beach houses perched on rocky outcrops to the right. As the camera ascends a stone stairway, the open beach gives way to a shaded, enclosed space defined by concrete walls and an overhead tree canopy. The scene then opens onto a quiet coastal street where wet asphalt reflects the dusk light, passing under street lamps and palm trees before reaching the entrance of the pier. Finally, the camera moves along the wooden planks of Del Perro Pier, passing white railings and vintage fixtures as it extends over the calm ocean toward the horizon.
